query: Validation came back clean — go ahead and open the pull request for this branch.
Push my feature branch and raise a PR, and fill in our PR template with the issue and design-doc links.
Dev's done and all the checks passed, cut me a PR.
Do a gh pr create for feat/rate-limit using the repo's template, not a hand-written body.
Everything's green after validate — ship it, but hand it off for me to merge, don't merge it yourself.
Take forge-42 from planning all the way to a merge-ready PR — plan it, build it TDD, validate, then ship, checking with me at the gates.
The PR's picked up Greptile and CodeRabbit comments — fix them and resolve the threads.
Run the type-check, lint, tests and security scan before I push anything.
Keep watching PR #128 and ping me the moment its checks go green so I can merge.
The PR merged to master — confirm CI is green there and close the linked issue.
